response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience but lacks the core mandatory requirements for this role. C++ experience is limited to a 7-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015, far short of the 5-10 years required. No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience is evident. No Windows platform focus, no SQL Server/Oracle experience listed, and no Summit platform exposure. Background is primarily web/full-stack with Node.js, TypeScript, and DLang.
strengths: Broad software engineering experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Strong testing/TDD discipline and craftsmanship mindset
Some C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on a developer-tooling product
concerns: Only ~7 months of professional C++ experience, far below the 5-10 year requirement
No Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain experience
No demonstrated SQL Server/Oracle or Windows-platform development experience

key_factors.factor: No financial services / fixed income domain
